title: Security Checkpoint #002 One thing that's changed in the way I approach Microsoft Security assessments is where I start. Years ago, I'd open Conditional Access, Safe Attachments, or Defender for Endpoint and immediately begin reviewing the configuration. - LinkedIn

Security Checkpoint #002 One thing that's changed in the way I approach Microsoft Security assessments is where I start. Years ago, I'd open Conditional Access, Safe Attachments, or Defender for Endpoint and immediately begin reviewing the configuration. &nbsp;&nbsp; LinkedIn
